member.name: T:LeadSoft.Adapter.Google.ReCaptchaService.DTOs.DTOSiteVerifyRequest
member.summary: Google ReCaptcha Site Verify Request DTO

member.name: P:LeadSoft.Adapter.Google.ReCaptchaService.DTOs.DTOSiteVerifyRequest.Secret
member.summary: Required. The shared key between your site and reCAPTCHA.

member.name: P:LeadSoft.Adapter.Google.ReCaptchaService.DTOs.DTOSiteVerifyRequest.Response
member.summary: Required. The user response token provided by the reCAPTCHA client-side integration on your site.

member.name: P:LeadSoft.Adapter.Google.ReCaptchaService.DTOs.DTOSiteVerifyRequest.RemoteIp
member.summary: Optional. The user's IP address.

member.name: M:LeadSoft.Adapter.Google.ReCaptchaService.DTOs.DTOSiteVerifyRequest.#ctor
member.summary: Base constructor

member.name: M:LeadSoft.Adapter.Google.ReCaptchaService.DTOs.DTOSiteVerifyRequest.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Information based constructor

member.name: T:LeadSoft.Adapter.Google.ReCaptchaService.DTOs.DTOSiteVerifyResponse
member.summary: Google ReCaptcha Site Verify Response DTO

member.name: P:LeadSoft.Adapter.Google.ReCaptchaService.DTOs.DTOSiteVerifyResponse.Success
member.summary: Success field

member.name: P:LeadSoft.Adapter.Google.ReCaptchaService.DTOs.DTOSiteVerifyResponse.ChallengeTs
member.summary: Timestamp of the challenge load (ISO format yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssZZ)

member.name: P:LeadSoft.Adapter.Google.ReCaptchaService.DTOs.DTOSiteVerifyResponse.Hostname
member.summary: The hostname of the site where the reCAPTCHA was solved

member.name: P:LeadSoft.Adapter.Google.ReCaptchaService.DTOs.DTOSiteVerifyResponse.ErrorCodes
member.summary: Optional error codes list
member.remarks:
Error codes descriptions:
- **missing-input-secret**: The secret parameter is missing.
- **invalid-input-secret**: The secret parameter is invalid or malformed.
- **missing-input-response**: The response parameter is missing.
- **invalid-input-response**: The response parameter is invalid or malformed.
- **bad-request**: The request is invalid or malformed.
- **timeout-or-duplicate**: The response is no longer valid: either is too old or has been used previously.

member.name: T:LeadSoft.Adapter.Google.ReCaptchaService.Google_ReCaptcha_EndPoint
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:LeadSoft.Adapter.Google.ReCaptchaService.Google_ReCaptcha_EndPoint.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:LeadSoft.Adapter.Google.ReCaptchaService.Google_ReCaptcha_EndPoint.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:LeadSoft.Adapter.Google.ReCaptchaService.Google_ReCaptcha_EndPoint.Post_SiteVerify_v1
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to siteverify?secret={0}&response={1}&remoteip={2}.

member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:LeadSoft.Adapter.Google.ReCaptchaService.Google_ReCaptcha_Enterprise_EndPoint.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:LeadSoft.Adapter.Google.ReCaptchaService.Google_ReCaptcha_Enterprise_EndPoint.Post_Assessment
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to assessments?key={0}.
